data.title: Legal Watchdog Seeks Investigation into Trump’s Promotion of Controversial TRUMP Token
data.description:

Public Citizen, a U.S.-based nonprofit watchdog group, has formally requested a federal investigation into President Donald Trump’s promotion of a cryptocurrency known as the TRUMP token. The complaint, submitted to the Department of Justice (DOJ) and the...
source: https://coinpedia.org/news/legal-watchdog-seeks-investigation-into-trumps-promotion-of-controversial-trump-token/

data.title: Aptos launches blockchain execution engine Shardines, which can achieve over one million TPS
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Aptos Labs announced the launch of Shardines, the next generation of blockchain execution engines designed to achieve horizontal scalability and more than 1 million TPS.
According to reports, the blockchain execution engine can be expanded independently of consensus and storage. This enables validator operators to optimize resources and enhance system flexibility. Shardines uses a dynamic partitioner to minimize cross-shard network communication and waiting time to adapt to changing workloads. The innovative "micro-batching and pipelining" strategy further mitigates the impact of network latency by amortizing costs, thereby ensuring high performance.
In addition, the team has open-sourced Shardines' fully reproducible benchmarks for blockchain enthusiasts to verify the results.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Fear And Greed Index Drops To Neutral
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Alternative.me indicates that the Cryptocurrency Fear and Greed Index has decreased to 49 today, down from 54 yesterday. This change suggests that the market remains in a 'neutral' state.

data.title: Deribit's BTC block option buys $85,000 put options at the end of April, totaling 275 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Lin Chen, head of Asia-Pacific business at Deribit, wrote on X that today’s largest BTC option was: a user purchased a put option worth $85,000 at the end of April, totaling 275 BTC, and paid a premium of $1.09 million.

data.title: Wealthy investor network ‘TIGER 21’ holds up to $6B worth of crypto
data.description:
TIGER 21, an investment firm for high-net-worth individuals, has $6 billion of its $200 billion portfolio allocated to crypto, with some of its 1,600 members reportedly “all in” on crypto assets.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/200-billion-tiger21-has-6-billion-worth-crypto?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Empower Oversight sues SEC for failing to disclose cryptocurrency reports
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News U.S. government regulator Empower Oversight has filed a lawsuit against the SEC, accusing it of failing to disclose a report on ethical conflicts and selective enforcement within the agency.
The lawsuit claims that the SEC's Office of Inspector General completed the report more than a year ago, but the agency has not released it despite repeated requests under the Freedom of Information Act.
The lawsuit seeks to force the SEC to disclose its findings related to William Hinman, former director of the SEC's Division of Corporate Finance. The investigation focuses on possible conflicts of interest in Hinman's relationship with his former law firm, Simpson Thacher, which has a financial interest in promoting Ethereum.
Empower Oversight has been pursuing transparency from the SEC since August 2021, filing multiple FOIA requests and lawsuits seeking documents related to the agency's communications with cryptocurrency entities. The regulator believes that the SEC's delays indicate a pattern of evading responsibility in its enforcement actions.

data.title: Empower Oversight Sues SEC Over Report Disclosure
data.description: According to Odaily, Empower Oversight, a U.S. government watchdog, has filed a lawsuit against the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for failing to release a report on internal ethical conflicts and selective enforcement within the agency. The lawsuit claims that the SEC's Office of Inspector General completed the report over a year ago, yet the agency has not disclosed it despite multiple requests under the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA). The legal action seeks to compel the SEC to reveal findings related to an investigation involving former SEC Director of Corporation Finance, William Hinman. The investigation focuses on potential conflicts of interest stemming from Hinman's ties to his former law firm, Simpson Thacher, which has financial interests in promoting Ethereum. Empower Oversight has been advocating for transparency from the SEC since August 2021, filing several FOIA requests and lawsuits to obtain documents related to the agency's communications with cryptocurrency entities. The watchdog argues that the SEC's delays indicate a pattern of evading accountability in its enforcement actions.

data.title: OSL Group Completes Acquisition of Japanese Compliant Crypto Exchange CoinBest and Renames It OSL Japan
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Hong Kong-listed OSL Group has completed the acquisition of Japanese cryptocurrency exchange CoinBest and officially renamed CoinBest to OSL Japan, with an eye on global expansion.
Kevin Cui, executive director and CEO of OSL Group, said in an interview that although Japan is a traditionally difficult market to penetrate, the acquisition of CoinBest provides an excellent opportunity to enter the Japanese market: "We will rely on the local team to expand our business in Japan."
Cui pointed out that OSL has been focusing on global expansion since last year because its native Hong Kong market is relatively limited in terms of user base. "We tend to expand in jurisdictions with more mature regulatory frameworks, and Japan's cryptocurrency regulatory environment is comparable to Hong Kong."

data.title: Pudgy Penguins CEO: The Ethereum Foundation has never communicated with me, but I can communicate with Solana officials at any time
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News In a recent interview with Odaily Planet Daily, regarding the "Ethereum Foundation controversy and whether there has been private contact", Pudgy Penguins CEO Luca Netz said, "The Ethereum Foundation has never communicated with me. Although I am personally very happy to communicate with EF, and based on Pudgy Penguins' achievements in the Ethereum ecosystem in the past few years, Fat Penguin can even be regarded as one of the best projects in the Ethereum ecosystem, but they have never contacted me. On the contrary, when I entered the Solana ecosystem, if I wanted, I could communicate with Solana co-founders Toly and Raj and others at any time. 
My personal conclusion is that Ethereum's mission and vision is a network country, not just to support builders and communicate with them. Perhaps Ethereum's mission is above all else."

data.title: Pudgy Penguins CEO: We will soon collaborate with Japanese AI industry veterans to launch the Abstract AI project and tokens
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News In a recent interview with Odaily Planet Daily, Pudgy Penguins CEO Luca Netz said about the follow-up development of the AI ​​sector of the Abstract ecosystem: "We have prepared some AI-related things for the PENGU ecosystem and the fat penguin ecosystem. We are about to deploy an AI project on the Abstract network with a senior AI industry expert from Japan. She is also a friend of mine. She has been deeply involved in the digital avatar field of Web2 for many years and has 4 years of experience in AI digital human production. She is a pioneer in this industry. She has had in-depth cooperation with LV and Balenciaga, and her digital avatar image has appeared on the stage as a supermodel. Later, she will launch new AI projects and corresponding tokens on Abstract. I think this will be the hottest token in the Abstract ecosystem so far, and I am also looking forward to her projects and products. So, there is no doubt that our ecosystem is about to usher in a big explosion of AI projects." In addition, he mentioned that the specific launch of the project is yet to be determined, but the AI ​​code name may be Miria AI.
